title: Clarifai deletes 3 million photos that OkCupid provided to train facial recognition AI, report says
snippet: The photo deletion comes after an FTC settlement with Clarifai. The company had asked OkCupid — whose executives had invested in Clarifai — to share data in 2014, according to court documents.
